title: Personal Curriculum
text_content:
Current Seasonal Skill Stack - 
Vocation Skill: Coaching
Evolutionary Skills: Content Creation
Resonant Skills: Clothing Design
Fundamental Skills: Digital Hygiene & Environment Design

Skill Stack Sequence
Vocation Skill: Coaching
Evolutionary Skills: Content Creation, Offer Creation, Copywriting, Sales, Public Speaking, Systems Thinking, Recruiting, Management, Leadership, Finance 
Resonant Skills: Clothing Design, Rapping, Motorcycling, Driving, Physical Combat, Weapons Combat
Fundamental Skills: Fitness & Movement, Nutrition & Metabolic Health, Sleep & Circadian Optimization, Financial Intelligence, Emotional Regulation, Self-Talk & Belief Work, Communication, Time & Focus Management, Meditation & Stillness, Meta-Learning & Synthesis, Relationship Health & Boundaries, Digital Hygiene & Environment Design, Breathwork & Somatic Practices, Shadow Work & Identity Integration.
